pokemon:tandemaus.name: Tandemaus
pokemon:tandemaus.summary: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.
The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.

pokemon:maushold.name: Maushold
pokemon:maushold.summary: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
